About Me

Building things that matter

I am a software developer and cybersecurity specialist based in London. I started my career in Nigeria building critical financial infrastructure for CBN-regulated institutions, and have since grown into a senior IT audit and cyber risk professional working across the UK's most demanding regulated environments.

What drives me is not just the technical work but what it makes possible. The fintech platforms I have built handle real money for real people. The edtech platforms I volunteer on have helped over 80 professionals start technology careers. I care deeply about technology that serves communities, not just organisations.

Alongside my professional career I have been recognised as Most Promising Software Development Professional of the Year by the Nigeria Technology Awards 2022, and I continue to build, teach, and give back voluntarily.

Certifications

CISA CRISC AWS Cloud Practitioner AWS Solutions Architect ITIL v4 OneTrust GRC Certified RPA Developer

01

Build purposefully

Every platform I build has a reason beyond the code. Financial inclusion, career access, digital safety — technology should serve a real human need.

02

Bridge the gap

I work at the intersection of software development and cybersecurity — understanding how systems are built and how they fail. That combination is rare and valuable.

03

Give back consistently

I teach, mentor, and build voluntarily. Not occasionally. Four years of voluntary platform development and consistent cohort teaching is a commitment, not a side project.

Fintech • CBN-Regulated Infrastructure

Rosabon Financial Services ERP

End-to-end Loan Collections and Credit Management module for one of Nigeria's leading non-bank financial institutions. Built automated debtor reporting, Paystack payment integration, and multi-role access controls. The system has been in continuous production since 2021.

Cybersecurity • Deloitte UK

GCC Controls Framework

Career

Where I have worked

May 2025 – March 2026

Internal Audit Manager (IT & Cloud)

Grant Thornton UK LLP • London

Led IT Audit, Cloud Security, Cybersecurity, and Third-Party Risk audits for global clients across transport, retail, FMCG, tech, and financial services. Presented findings to CIOs, CISOs, and Audit Committees.

April 2022 – April 2025

IT Auditor & Cyber Control Lead Analyst

Deloitte UK • London

Designed the GCC Mapping Framework (1,081 controls, 28 standards) and MFS12 Cybersecurity Test Procedures used across Deloitte and global member firms. Led ITGC, SOX, ISO 27001, and GRC solution design engagements.

April 2021 – March 2022

Senior Software Developer (General Manager Grade)

Concept Nova / The Concept Group • Lagos, Nigeria

Primary developer of the Rosabon Financial Services ERP Loan Collections module. CBN-regulated platform serving 100,000+ customers with NGN 201bn+ credit processed. Recognised as Most Promising Software Development Professional of the Year, NiTA 2022.

June 2019 – April 2021

IT Audit, Risk & Control Analyst

Deloitte & Touche • Lagos, Nigeria

Led IT Risk Assessment, SAP ERP implementation for Nigerian state government, SOX ITGC audits, and Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing across major client engagements.

April 2019 – June 2019

System Solutions Developer

Vas2Net Technologies • Lagos, Nigeria

Designed and built the NIBSS PSSP Integration Application enabling small businesses to access Nigeria's national payment infrastructure through Vas2Net's CBN-licensed aggregator.

2016 – 2019

Software Developer

CWG Plc (Computer Warehouse Group) • Lagos, Nigeria

Core developer on BillsnPay, a bills presentment and payment platform processing 30.5 million transactions annually. Also built the Enugu State Government Gaming and Lotto Commission regulatory platform.

Beyond the Day Job

Giving back to the community

🏫

Tech Career Teaching

Voluntary BA and PM instructor on SwiftProfile across multiple cohorts since 2023. Former students have secured technology roles and promotions, crediting the training as a turning point in their careers.

🎤

Cybersecurity Public Speaking

Guest Lecturer at the Papa-Ajao Muslim Community Central Mosque Annual Post-Ramadan Lecture 2025 in Lagos. Delivered "Digital Self-Defense: How to Stay Safe in a World of Scams" to an audience of 250 community members.

📚

Digital Safety Writing

Published author on cybersecurity awareness. Writing on digital self-defense and online safety for general audiences, making expert knowledge accessible to communities outside corporate environments.
